_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in assessing a target's frame of reference (e.g., motivation, technical capability, organizational structure, sensitivities).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including stakeholder interviews, artifact review, maturity scoring, and finding synthesis.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-003 (TF, cosine: 0.515), AB-S-002 (AB, cosine: 0.503).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.565). Shared vocabulary: [organizational, skill]. DCWF-only terms [assessing, capability, frame, motivation, reference, s] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, assessments, conducting, data, diagnostic] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.870 (P=0.865, R=0.875). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:75.9%, C:24.1%). No dominant classification for "Skill in assessing a target's frame of reference (e.g., motivation, technical ca" vs "Skill in conducting organizational data and AI diagnostic assessments, including" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.516 ≈ STS 0.565 (gap 0.049). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [organizational, skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.4%. Shared tokens: [organizational, skill]. DCWF-only: [assessing, capability, frame, motivation, reference, s]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, assessments, conducting, data, diagnostic].
